close_reason: Epoch is now a required parameter on all Sequencer public API calls
description:
The sequencer's public interface should require epoch on all calls. Currently:

**Issues:**
- `:next_read_version` has no epoch check at all
- `:next_commit_version` and `:report_successful_commit` have delegation patterns where epoch-checking clauses delegate to epoch-less clauses

**Changes:**
1. Add epoch parameter to `:next_read_version` call
2. Update all callers to pass epoch
3. Inline the logic into the epoch-checking handle_call clauses
4. Remove the epoch-less handle_call clauses (no more delegation)

Epoch is a required parameter for all sequencer operations.
title: Enforce epoch checks on all Sequencer.Server public calls
